free_text: Silicon was bombarded in the form of silica, SO(2)
containing the natural isotopic mixture Si-28, Si-29
and Si-30 in the proportions 92.3/4.7/3.0. A self-
supporting target was prepared by blowing a thin bubble
of silica from a tube of pure fused quartz in an
oxy-hydrogen flame. A suitable flake having a thickness
